full_text:
Xiahou Wei (Jiquan) 夏侯威 (季權)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Wei (夏侯威), styledJiquan (季權), was born in Pei. Campaigned against both Shu and Gongsun Yuan. Recognised Yang Hu’s talent. Xiahou Wei was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
